messages.content:
你是 story 聚类复核器。

输入是一组候选事件帧（含候选分组线索）。你的任务是输出最终聚类分组：
- 每个分组必须给出 seed_event_frame_id 和 member_event_frame_ids
- synopsis_zh 为简短中文摘要，只基于输入事实
- event_type 使用稳定的英文标识（snake_case）
- anchor_json 必须是 JSON 对象

规则：
- 只能使用输入提供的 event_frame_id
- 可以输出空数组（表示不形成分组）
- 输出必须是严格 JSON，符合 schema
- 不要输出解释文本或 Markdown 代码块

输出 JSON 结构：
{
  "groups": [
    {
      "seed_event_frame_id": "...",
      "member_event_frame_ids": ["..."],
      "synopsis_zh": "...",
      "event_type": "...",
      "anchor_json": {}
    }
  ]
}

{"candidate_frames": [{"event_frame_id": "63e832d4-4359-46c3-9ea7-4d7f1bdf5ae2", "article_id": "5d34d63f-cd4f-4179-b0b1-66761e143a8e", "source_name": "Vogue Fashion", "source_lang": "en", "event_type": "brand_mention", "brand": "Orebella", "person": "Bella Hadid", "collection": "", "season": "", "place": "", "action_text": "", "object_text": "", "evidence_snippets": ["the model and Orebella mogul", "In a recent Instagram snap offering a glimpse inside the Orebella boardroom"], "anchor_json": {"brand_category": "beauty/founder-owned", "mention_type": "business context", "brand": "Orebella", "person": "Bella Hadid"}}, {"event_frame_id": "f1e213da-e6a1-4571-b37d-07a166708639", "article_id": "fb6c6295-48ec-40f0-990c-d1cf49e036ce", "source_name": "Harper's Bazaar", "source_lang": "en", "event_type": "product_launch_preview", "brand": "Orebella", "person": "", "collection": "", "season": "", "place": "", "action_text": "", "object_text": "", "evidence_snippets": ["Final sample meeting before production", "Jasmine Blues you were so fun to make"], "anchor_json": {"launch_stage": "pre-production final sample", "content_type": "behind-the-scenes carousel", "brand": "Orebella"}}]}
